news.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
news.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

news.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
news.summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

news.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
news.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

news.title: The climate tech IPO window could finally be cracking open
news.summary: Nuclear startup X-energy went public, geothermal startup Fervo is about to. Could this be the moment that climate tech investors have been waiting for?

news.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
news.summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.

news.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
news.summary: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). news.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
news.summary: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically. news.title: Researchers say we’re talking less than ever
news.summary: Researchers at the University of Missouri-Kansas City and the University of Arizona say that between 2005 and 2019, the number of words we speak out loud to another human being fell by nearly 28 percent.
